etymology.description: 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 袁(袁) (yuán, "long") = seeing clearly -> to see clearly
etymology.interpretation: The character 睘(qióng) combines 目(目) (mù, "eye") as the semantic component, indicating vision, with 袁(袁) (yuán, "long") as the phonetic element, suggesting the clarity of vision. This combination conveys the idea of seeing clearly.
